title: corybas calophyllus var. sepalinus
intro: Corybas calophyllus var. sepalinus, also known as the Australian corybas, is a unique orchid species native to Australia. It is a terrestrial orchid known for its striking appearance and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Corybas calophyllus var. sepalinus can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its roots are often used in traditional medicine to provide relief from these conditions.
